case_title: BELLACH'S LEATHER FOR LIVING, INC. VS MAUDLIN, RICK

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,810.72 FILED BY BELLACH'S LEATHER FOR LIVING, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MAUDLIN, RICK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-03-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF BELLACH'S LEATHER FOR LIVING, INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MAUDLIN, RICK
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,883.40 FILED BY MAUDLIN, RICK AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT BELLACH'S LEATHER FOR LIVING, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-03-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MAUDLIN, RICK

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT MAUDLIN, RICK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT BELLACH'S LEATHER FOR LIVING, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BELLACH'S LEATHER FOR LIVING, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAUDLIN, RICK $2,760.72 PRINCIPAL, $131.99 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,892.71, WITHIN 15 DAYS OF THE DATE OF THIS JUDGMENT, PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT SHALL SCHEDULE A DATE OF DELIVERY OF THE SUBJECT FURNITURE. AT THE TIME OF DELIVERY, DEFENDANT SHALL TENDER TO PLAINTIFF THE "LOANER" FURNITURE IN DEFENDANT'S POSSESSION. ALL COSTS OF DELIVERY AND PICK-UP SHALL BE BORNE BY PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PHOTOCOPY OF PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFT'SCLAIM FILED /INFORMED PLTFF ORIGINAL REQUIRED;PLTFF STATES PRO CESS SERVER MAILED TO COURT THE ORIGINAL ON 3/29.
